players.title: Players
players.minRequired: Add at least 1 player to start the game

rounds.title: Number of Rounds
rounds.description: rounds per game (each player throws 3 darts per round)

rules.title: Cricket {mode} Rules
common: Close each target by hitting it 3 times
Single = 1 mark, Double = 2 marks, Triple = 3 marks

standard.title: Standard Mode:
rules: Score points for YOURSELF on your closed targets
Winner: Close all targets AND have the MOST points

cutThroat.title: Cut Throat Mode:
rules: Give points to OPPONENTS on your closed targets
Winner: Close all targets AND have the LEAST points

errors.minPlayers: You need at least 1 player to start!
errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to Granboard. Make sure it's powered on and try again.

legend.title: Legend
legend.mprDesc: Average number of marks per round. A good player reaches 3+ MPR.
legend.standardDesc: Close your numbers (3 marks) then score points by continuing to hit those numbers. The player with the most points wins!
legend.cutThroatDesc: Points (shown in red) are BAD! When you hit a number you've closed but your opponents haven't, you give them points. Close your targets quickly to avoid receiving points. The player with the LEAST points wins!
legend.cutThroatWarning: Cut Throat: Points in red = BAD!

dialog.title: Choose Player Order
dialog.subtitle: How would you like to determine the player order?
dialog.manualSubtitle: Use arrows to organize player order
dialog.currentOrderDesc: Keep the order players were added

modal.title: Throw for Order
modal.subtitle: Each player throws one dart. Highest score goes first!

players.title: Players
players.minRequired: Add at least 1 player to start the game

doubleOut.title: Double Out
doubleOut.description: Must finish exactly on 0 with a double

rules.title: 01 Rules
common: Start with a score of 301, 501 or 701
Subtract your points from the remaining score
If you go below 0 or land on 1, it's a 'bust' and your turn is lost

doubleOut.title: Double Out:
rules: You MUST finish on a double to win
Finishing on anything other than a double is a 'bust'

errors.minPlayers: You need at least 1 player to start!
errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to Granboard. Make sure it's powered on and try again.

legend.title: Legend & Rules
legend.objectiveDesc: Subtract your points from the starting score to reach exactly 0
legend.ppdDesc: Average points scored per dart (Total points scored ÷ Number of darts thrown)
legend.bustDesc: If you go below 0 or land on 1, it's a bust. Your turn is lost and your score remains unchanged.
legend.doubleOutDesc: When enabled, you MUST finish on a double to win. Finishing on anything other than a double is a bust.

sounds.title: Debug Sounds
sounds.subtitle: Test all application sounds
sounds.tip: Tip: Enable sound and adjust volume above
sounds.dartMissDesc: Sound when a dart misses the target

animations.title: Debug Animations
animations.subtitle: Test all application animations
animations.threeMissDesc: Animation when player misses 3 times (the goat)
animations.singleDoubleTripleDesc: Animation for single, double, triple: \ X ⊗
animations.threeDoublesDesc: Animation for 3 doubles: X X X
animations.tip: Click an animation to view it fullscreen

spectator.createRoomDescription: Share your game with friends and let them watch in real-time from any device.
spectator.scanQr: Scan this QR code to watch the game
spectator.roomNotFound: Room not found or no longer available.
spectator.hostDisconnected: The host has ended the game session.
spectator.hostSetting: The host is setting up the game. Please wait...
spectator.unsupportedGame: This game type is not yet supported for spectating.
spectator.enterCodeDescription: Enter a game code to watch a live game as a spectator.

freeThrow.title: Free Throw
freeThrow.description: Just throw darts, track your accuracy and grouping stats
freeThrow.waitingForDarts: Connect your board and start throwing!

targetPractice.title: Target Practice
targetPractice.description: Hit the number the app tells you, score points for accuracy

checkout.title: Checkout Practice
checkout.description: Practice finishing from specific scores with suggested checkout paths
